name: mind-mentor-microservices
description: Root package for running all microservices concurrently

scripts.start:all: concurrently -n gateway,auth,assess,recom,track,notify,health,community,admin,ai,emotion,analytics,screen,client,chat -c cyan,magenta,blue,yellow,green,red,cyan,white,magenta,blue,yellow,green,red,cyan,gray "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:assessment" "npm run start:recommendation" "npm run start:tracking" "npm run start:notification" "npm run start:healthcare" "npm run start:community" "npm run start:admin" "npm run start:ai" "npm run start:emotion" "npm run start:analytics" "npm run start:screening" "npm run start:client" "npm run start:chat"
